>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       jdk12beta port should register open-motif-devel as RUN_DEPENDS

>Environment:
FreeBSD sip-myleal.tcoip 4.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE #3: Mon Jul 16 15:13:4 BRT 2001     myleal@sip-myleal.tcoip:/usr/src/sys/compile/SIP-MYLEAL  i386

>Description:
The freebsd native java 1.2 port requires the openmotif-libs to run. If openmotif was uninstalled, it will not run with :
Exception in thread "main" java.lang.UnsatisfiedLinkError: /usr/local/jdk1.2.2/jre/lib/i386/libawt.so: Shared object "libXm.so.2" not found
	at java.lang.ClassLoader$NativeLibrary.load(Native Method)
	at java.lang.ClassLoader.loadLibrary0(ClassLoader.java:1319)
	at java.lang.ClassLoader.loadLibrary(ClassLoader.java:1235)
#
Error
>How-To-Repeat:
Just pkg_delete open-motif
>Fix:
FIX Port makefile RUN_DEPENDS
>Release-Note:
>Audit-Trail:
